title: Big News for you ‼️New Price after GST #gst #gstupdates #govt #shopping #finsaheli
description:
From September 22, 2025, Pricing are changing for below :

What Getting Cheaper: 
• Health & Life Insurance → GST cut from 18% to%
0%
• Everyday food → UHT milk, paneer, chapati, roti,
paratha → now 0% GST
• Education items → notebooks, pencils, crayons,
globes → 0% GST
• Household essentials → soap, toothpaste, shampoo, bicycles → 5% GST (down from 12%)
• Wellness → gyms, salons, yoga centres → now at 5% gst 
• Hotel stays → rooms up to ₹7,500/night → 5% gst
• Consumer durables → ACs, TVs, dishwashers →
18% GST (down from 28%)
• Automobiles → small cars, three-wheelers, bikes
up to 350cc → 18% GST
• Cement → down from 28% to 18%

What Gets Costlier:
• Coal → up from 5% to 18%
• Sugary & aerated drinks → new 40% GST
• Luxury cars, cigarettes, pan masala, gutkha → new 40% GST slab

#gst #gstupdates #gstindia #govt #finsaheli
